title: The role of informal advice on innovation for sustainability (example of Italy, the Czech Republic and the Netherlands)
description: This practice abstract examines how informal advice and peer-to-peer learning support the adoption of sustainable soil management practices, such as non-inversion tillage and cover crops, in Italy, the Netherlands and the Czech Republic. It shows that farmers often rely first on practical demonstrations by peers and later on private advisors, alongside governmental measures, to implement environmental innovations.
